narrative: G7 finance chiefs warn on war's economic risks, signaling action on inflation and supply chains — USD mixed. EUR/USD holds at 1.1786 as ECB stance remains cautious; GBP/USD consolidates near 1.3524. USD/JPY firms to 159.44 on BoJ rate hike speculation, while AUD/USD gains to 0.7168 on RBA's hiking bias. Gold higher +0.16% on safe-haven demand, equities steady +0.26% and VIX at 17.9.
